COMMENT: CMS obtained this information from the State Medicare Modernization Act (MMA) files in the original 
MBSF data product. This information has traditionally been considered the “gold standard” for 
identifying dual eligibles, but does not include information on U.S. territory dual eligible beneficiaries. 
The MBSF ABCD V2 sources its dual status data from a different CME source table that combines
